hero.subtitle: Your home and your business never stop for lack of power again.

processo.title: From simulation to installation — no surprises.

steps.title: Simulation & Contact
steps.copy: Use the simulator at the top of the page. Our team calls you back in under 24 hours.

steps.title: Technical Survey
steps.copy: A precise on-site visit to assess your roof and consumption. Cost of 5,000 CVE (100% deductible from the contract).

steps.title: Protection Plan
steps.copy: You receive a transparent final proposal with the exact calculation of your solar production, savings and payback.

steps.title: Installation & Connection
steps.copy: Precise technical assembly by certified professionals with live load testing. Your life doesn't stop.

impactoDia.title: The impact on your daily life

items.title: Don't stop cooking.
items.copy: Fridge and freezer always on. Zero food waste.

items.title: Don't stop working.
items.copy: Active Wi-Fi, charged computers and lighting to work or study.

items.title: Air conditioning without guilt.
items.copy: Use cooling during the hottest hours knowing the sun pays the bill.

finalCta.title: The grid fails. Cabo Energia doesn't.
finalCta.subtitle: The initial assessment is free and with no commitment.

solucoes.title: Your level of energy, your choice.

residencial.promise: The sun pays your electricity bill, every month.
Plenty of energy for the whole home.
Total independence — live as if ELECTRA didn't exist.

negocio.promise: Your business never stops. Your bill drops.

impactBento.title: Before and after.
impactBento.card1Title: Blackout in the area, Light in your Home.
impactBento.card1Copy: The kitchen, the Wi-Fi, your life — it doesn't stop.
impactBento.card2Title: Let the Sun pay the bill.
impactBento.card3Copy: Produce your own energy and be part of Cape Verde's sustainable future.

plans.name: Full Plan
features: Response within 4h with immediate replacement on failure

rede.title: A promise the competition can't make.
rede.body: Your business joins the Protected Businesses Network. Display the certificate in your window — and tell the market that here, the power never stops.

leadPanel.title: Ligar Cabo
leadPanel.subtitle: Leave your details. We'll contact you in under 24 hours — no commitment.
leadPanel.name: Full name
leadPanel.error: We couldn't register you right now. Contact us directly:
leadPanel.successBody: Our team will call you within the next 24 hours. Cape Verde can't stop.

simulador.title: Find out how much you can save
simulador.subtitle: In 2 minutes, see a real estimate for your home or business.
simulador.step2TitleBusiness: What kind of space is it?
simulador.step2HintHome: Select the profile that best describes your home.
simulador.step3Title: How much do you pay for electricity per month?
simulador.step3Hint: Move the slider to see your savings in real time.
simulador.roofYes: I have my own roof or terrace
simulador.roofNo: I don't have my own roof (tenant)
simulador.disclaimer: Indicative estimate. The personalised study is free and with no commitment.
simulador.privacy: Your data is used only to schedule the study. Never shared.
simulador.errorMsg: We couldn't register you right now. Contact us directly:
simulador.step6Body: We've received your request. Kevin from Cabo Energia will contact you within 24 hours to confirm the estimate and schedule the technical survey.
simulador.step6Note: Save the number +238 995 41 81 to recognise Kevin's call.

essencial: Doors open when the neighbours close

pages.residencialSubtitle: Solar energy with battery: continuous comfort and a falling bill, even when the grid fails.
pages.empresarialSubtitle: Continuous solar energy for shops, services and industry. No blackouts, with a falling bill.

casaPreocupacoes.overline: The end of blackouts at home
casaPreocupacoes.headline: Stop living to ELECTRA's rhythm.

items.title: Spoiled food
items.desc: When the power goes, the fridge stops — and the week's food with it.

items.title: Sleepless nights
items.desc: With no AC or fan, the heat won't let anyone sleep.

items.title: No water at home
items.desc: The pump stops and you're left without water right when you need it most.

items.title: Vulnerable home
items.desc: Alarms, cameras and lights go out. And the kids with no light to study.

casaFatura.headline: Your electricity bill, finally going down.
casaFatura.todayNote: With ELECTRA — and rising every year.
casaFatura.withNote: Savings start in the very first month — and the sun doesn't raise the price.
casaFatura.financingTitle: You don't have to pay it all at once.
casaFatura.financingBody: We have instalment and financing options. Talk to us and we'll build a plan to fit your budget.

negocioCusto.headline: How much does a blackout really cost your business?

items.title: Spoiled stock
items.desc: Fridges and freezers stop. Fresh produce lost in just a few hours.

items.title: Sales halted
items.desc: No till, no card machine, no light. Every hour closed is revenue that won't come back.

items.title: Generator diesel
items.desc: Thousands of CVE a month in fuel — and the price only goes up.

items.title: Damaged equipment
items.desc: Power surges and outages burn out expensive machines.

vsGerador.headline: The generator burns money. The sun works for free.

rows.label: Monthly cost
rows.gerador: Constant diesel — rises with the price

rows.label: Reliability
rows.gerador: Breaks down at the worst moment

vsGerador.roiBody: After that, your energy is practically free — while the generator keeps costing every month.
